title: HUIHUANG Green Sheer Christmas Ribbon 2.5 inch Hunter Green Wired Organza Ribbon with Satin Stripe, for X-mas Tree, Bows Making, Wreaths, Gift Wrapping, Wedding Home Decor-Continous 10 Yards
features: Size: Ribbon measures 2-1/2" wide and 10 yards (30 feet ) continuous long each roll in a paper box
Color: Green organza sheer with dark green satin stripe. This wired ribbon is suitable for making bows for your wreath, Christmas tree, centerpiece, door hanger, lantern, garland, gift wrap and other

Material: This ribbon is made from sheer organza with a satin center stripe, and equipped with wired edges, which allow for easy shaping and molding. This feature makes it perfect for creating structured bows, loops, and other decorative elements

Application: This would be a great way to decorate your gifts and home for the holiday season. For wreaths, garland, gift wrapping, floral arrangements, event decor, mantles, staircases, bows, green Christmas tree, swags, home décor and other craft projects

Our ribbons are available in a wide array of colors, size and types, this variety allows for endless creative possibilities, whether you're matching a specific color scheme or adding texture and visual interest to your projects
description: 2.5 inch Shimmer Organza Wired Ribbon with Satin Middle - -Combination of satin and sheer textures. --Equipped with wired edges, which allow for easy shaping and molding. --Can be used in various decorative projects, including gift wrapping, floral arrangements, event decor, wreath-making, Christmas tree, tree top bows, holiday decorations, staircase ballard, vases decor, indoor and outdoor decoration and more. --Can be used for decorations for special events like weddings, birthday, baby shower, bridal shower and holiday celebrations like Christmas, Thanksgiving, Easter day, Halloween, Valentine's day and more.
